title: Real-time endpoint feature contract
content: The SageMaker real-time endpoint expects JSON with one instances array. Feature order is age, gender, miles, debt, income. Every value must be numeric.

title: Gender encoding reference
content: The trained car-sales model expects gender to be supplied as an existing numeric encoding. Use gender 0 when a request says encoded as gender 0 or asks for the default CI smoke-test scenario.

title: No-debt scenario default
content: When a request describes a no-debt customer or asks for the standard no-debt default, set the debt feature to 0.

title: RAG CI smoke-test scenario
content: The canonical real-time endpoint smoke test uses age 28, gender 0, miles 23, debt 0, and income 4099. It should return a JSON response containing a predictions array.
